title: Autoencoders Path
description: Build fluency in Autoencoders inside Generative Models by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Variational Autoencoders (VAE)
steps.summary: Variational Autoencoders (VAE) belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders. It sits inside Generative Models / Autoencoders. Start after Variational Autoencoders and VAE. It opens into Categorical Variational Autoencoders (C-VAE) and Categorical Variational Autoencoders (C-VAE) Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE)
steps.summary: Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE) belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders. It sits inside Generative Models / Autoencoders. Start after Variational Autoencoders and Autoencoders. It opens into Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE) Extensions and Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE) Extensions Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE) Extensions
steps.summary: Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE) Extensions belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders. It sits inside Generative Models / Autoencoders. Start after Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE) and Variational Autoencoders. It opens into Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE) Extensions Extensions Techniques and Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE) Extensions Extensions Techniques Enhancements Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE) Extensions Extensions Techniques
steps.summary: Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE) Extensions Extensions Techniques belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders.
